title: Sprint 12 Planning Meeting Minutes
content:
Sprint 12 Goals (3/17-3/28):

1. User profile page redesign (Frontend-Li, 3 story points)
2. Order API v2 development (Backend-Zhang, 5 story points)
3. Payment callback optimization (Backend-Zhang, 3 story points)
4. Login flow security hardening (Backend-Zhang, 2 story points)
5. Regression test suite update (QA-Zhao, 2 story points)
6. Performance test report (QA-Zhao, 3 story points)

Total: 18 story points
Commitment: All 6 items
Demo time: 3/28, 3:00 PM
